articles.title: From Superstar To 'Flop Actor': Akshay Kumar's Welcome To The Jungle Trailer Sparks Buzz
articles.description: The trailer of Welcome to the Jungle is finally here, and it's bringing exactly what fans expected—absolute chaos. Starring Akshay Kumar as a struggling "flop actor" caught in a fake ₹2000-crore film that spirals into real danger, the trailer embraces self-aware humour, over-the-top comedy, and classic Welcome-style madness. With a massive ensemble cast including Jackie Shroff, Suniel Shetty, Paresh Rawal and many more, the film looks set to deliver confusion, comedy and complete entertainment. Film fake, problems real—and the internet can't stop talking about it.
